starting_object: q(omega, theta, phi, rho) = exp(a(omega) + b(theta) i + c(phi) j + d(rho) k)
hard_constraints: norm-only models are blind to theta, phi, rho at the pointwise level
admissible_function_classes: Class P: C^3, 2pi-periodic, finite through third derivative on [-2pi,2pi]
Class L: C^3 on [-2pi,2pi] without periodic identification, diagnostic only
